allow: Bash(timeout 18 python -m streamlit run app.py --server.headless true --server.port 8533)
Bash(python -c "import ast; [ast.parse\(open\(f,encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\) for f in \('intake.py','mapping_memory.py','llm_mapper.py'\)]; print\('syntax OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys, pandas, numpy, sklearn, xgboost; print\('py', sys.version.split\(\)[0], '| pandas', pandas.__version__, '| sklearn OK | xgboost OK'\)")
PowerShell(python -c "import pandas, numpy, sklearn, xgboost; print\('pandas', pandas.__version__\); print\('numpy', numpy.__version__\)")

PowerShell(python "$env:TEMP\\bayyina_golden_run.py" > "$env:TEMP\\bayyina_golden_repeat.txt"; if \(\(Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\bayyina_golden_before.txt" -Raw\) -eq \(Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\bayyina_golden_repeat.txt" -Raw\)\) { 'DETERMINISTIC: identical digests' } else { 'NON-DETERMINISTIC: digests differ' })
